required_preferences.fact: Starts every workday with a cup of herbal tea while reviewing her task list — strictly avoids coffee and caffeinated beverages

supersedes.fact: Starts every workday with a hand-brewed cup of coffee while reviewing her task list — never uses a pod machine

required_preferences.fact: Now books collaborative meetings and brainstorming sessions in the morning with the cross-functional team — prefers meetings earlier in the day to align on project goals

supersedes.fact: Schedules focus blocks for complex coding tasks in the morning — never books meetings before noon if avoidable

required_preferences.fact: Prefers in-person networking during conferences, taking initiative to approach potential partners at workshops and social events instead of waiting for introductions through colleagues.
Prepares easy-to-carry vegetarian lunches for office days — avoids meal prep requiring heating or elaborate assembly at work
Requests help from her boyfriend or orders ready-to-eat vegetarian meals due to difficulty prepping food with one hand
Performs a brief calming yoga or gentle stretching routine before bed instead of any strenuous evening activity, as prescribed by her sleep specialist to support better sleep with sleep apnea.

persona: A junior web developer at a nonprofit organization
